use_cases: Displaying rotating content items with smooth motion transitions in web applications
Creating product image galleries for e-commerce product pages
Building testimonial or review sliders for landing pages
Implementing feature showcases in SaaS marketing sites
Displaying portfolios or media galleries with drag-to-navigate functionality
ai_summary: Ibelick Carousel is a motion-powered React carousel component with drag gesture support, featuring a context-based state management system and dual controlled/uncontrolled modes. It provides smooth animations via motion/react, chevron navigation controls, and is designed as a flexible, reusable carousel system suitable for showcasing content items in galleries, product displays, or testimonial sections across various web applications.
